task: feat: cache de respostas por hash de contexto — zero tokens para prompts repetidos (issue #24)

todos.title: feat: add CacheConfig type to config package and load from devon.toml
todos.description: Add CacheConfig struct (Enabled, TTL, MaxSizeMB, OnlyOneShot) to profiles.go. Add Cache *CacheConfig field to TomlConfig. Add Cache CacheConfig field to Config struct and load from TOML in Config.Load(). Map TOML section [cache].

todos.title: feat: add cache_entries table to database schema
todos.description: Add CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cache_entries to internal/db/schema.go with columns: hash_key TEXT PRIMARY KEY, model TEXT NOT NULL, response TEXT NOT NULL, tokens_saved INTEGER DEFAULT 0, file_hashes TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, expires_at DATETIME. Add index on expires_at.

todos.title: feat: implement deterministic SHA-256 hash for cache keys
todos.description: Create internal/cache/hash.go with HashKey(model string, messages []llm.Message) string. Serialize messages deterministically (sorted keys, stable JSON), prepend model name, compute SHA-256 hex digest. Same input must always produce same output.

todos.title: feat: implement SQLite-backed cache store operations
todos.description: Create internal/cache/store.go with SQLiteCacheStore struct wrapping *sql.DB. Implement: GetEntry(ctx, hashKey) (*CacheEntry, error), SetEntry(ctx, entry) error, DeleteExpired(ctx) error, GetStats(ctx) (*CacheStats, error), Clear(ctx) error. Use modernc.org/sqlite. Run own schema migration for cache_entries table.

todos.title: feat: implement Cache struct with Get/Set/Stats/Clear and TTL + file-invalidation logic
todos.description: Create internal/cache/cache.go with Cache struct wrapping SQLiteCacheStore. Get(ctx, key, files) checks entry existence, TTL expiry, file mod-time changes. Set(ctx, key, response, tokens, files) saves entry. Stats(ctx) returns hits/misses/tokens-saved. Clear(ctx) removes all entries. TTL configured from CacheConfig.

todos.title: feat: add --no-cache flag to devon run subcommand
todos.description: Add --no-cache bool flag to runCmd in cmd/devon/main.go. Pass its value through to runOneShot. When set, skip cache lookup entirely. Wire to config so --no-cache overrides CacheConfig.Enabled.

todos.title: feat: add devon cache subcommand with stats and clear
todos.description: Add cache cobra command to newRootCommand() with subcommands: 'devon cache stats' (prints accumulated tokens saved) and 'devon cache clear' (deletes all cache entries). Both open DB at cfg.WorkDir/.devon/devon.db and use Cache struct.

todos.title: feat: integrate cache lookup into one-shot execution flow
todos.description: In runOneShot (cmd/devon/main.go), after building messages and before calling llm.Stream, compute hash, check cache. On HIT: return cached response immediately (skip LLM call). On MISS: call LLM, save response + tokens to cache. Respect --no-cache flag and CacheConfig.OnlyOneShot.
evidence: cache lookup before LLM call in runOneShot
cache save after successful LLM call

todos.title: test: unit tests for deterministic hash
todos.description: Create internal/cache/hash_test.go with table-driven tests: same input twice = same hash, different model = different hash, different messages = different hash, empty messages edge case.

todos.title: test: unit tests for cache hit, miss, TTL expiry, and file invalidation
todos.description: Create internal/cache/cache_test.go with table-driven tests using in-memory SQLite. Test: Set then Get returns response (hit), Get nonexistent key returns miss, Get expired entry returns miss, Set entry then modify tracked file returns miss, Stats returns correct counters.

todos.title: chore: run full build, test, vet, and lint suite until green
todos.description: Run go build ./..., go test ./... -race, go vet ./..., golangci-lint run. Fix any new issues introduced by prior TODOs. Ensure .task-state.json is cleaned after completion.
